services.title: Cross Platform with WebGL
services.description: The right way to build apps—saving development and maintenance costs immediately and in the long term. One codebase for every platform: Android, iPhone, all browsers, smart TVs, social networks, and more.

services.title: Immersive 3D experiences
services.description: Game and 3D apps attract users. Far beyond standard sites and apps, 3D creates a powerful user experience and interaction that keeps people engaged and coming back.

services.title: One Vision
services.description: OneCode offers full business development to maximize your app investment: business plan, investor deck, product definition, and go-to-market planning and execution.

specializations.title: WebGL
specializations.description: WebGL is a JavaScript API that enables complex, 3D graphics on the web without plugins. What once belonged only to game consoles now runs in browsers. Build a single advanced 3D app that runs on desktop, mobile, and smart TV browsers.

specializations.title: HTML5
specializations.description: HTML5 is solidifying itself as the standard core for internet applications—and even beyond. The latest evolution of HTML lets us create rich, advanced environments that work on every platform.

specializations.title: PhoneGap
specializations.description: PhoneGap lets you create apps for every device—iPhone, Android, Windows Mobile, and more—while using web technologies that follow standards. Build once for the web and as a downloadable store app.

specializations.title: Unity3D
specializations.description: Unity3D enables building mobile and desktop apps with one codebase and the most advanced tools available. OneCode's graphics and 3D skills push Unity3D as far as it can go.

portfolioCategories.title: 3D Applications
portfolioCategories.description: Apps that blend 3D are the strongest tool to capture attention for long periods and to visualize products or advanced learning environments.

portfolioCategories.title: Cross-Platform Development
portfolioCategories.description: Cross-platform development best answers the need to provide users a consistent experience on mobile, desktop, and everywhere else.

portfolioCategories.title: Mobile Applications
portfolioCategories.description: Cross-platform development best answers the need to deliver a consistent experience on mobile, desktops, and every device your users prefer.

portfolioCategories.title: Game Development
portfolioCategories.description: Games are powerful tools for marketing, storytelling, and revenue—but only when done right. OneCode knows how to add the right elements to make a game succeed.

portfolioCategories.title: HTML5 and WebGL Development
portfolioCategories.description: HTML5 and WebGL enable rich, interactive experiences that run natively in every browser—no plugins required. OneCode delivers high-performance web applications that reach users on any device.

projects.title: Promo mini game for the Pazam app
projects.description: A marketing mini game as part of promoting a product in the Pazam soldiers' app. Built on OneCode's game engine for quick development of advertising, marketing, and branding games.

projects.title: Engine for the Word Puzzle game app
projects.description: A game engine for creating word games. Players must find the correct word under a time limit by dragging letters into place.

projects.title: KKL Quiz 2018 app – Zionism, People, Environment
projects.description: A quiz game app about Zionism, people, and the environment. Built to help students prepare for the KKL quiz and school exam.

projects.title: TAP engine development
projects.description: TAP engine for game apps—lets various items move toward a target while players try to stop them from reaching it.

projects.title: Running Monkey game
projects.description: Runner-style mini game where players collect good items to score points while dodging obstacles.

projects.title: Obstacle plane mini game – in the Pazam app
projects.description: Mini game for the Pazam soldiers' app. Participants earn points, climb the weekly leaderboard, and win prizes.

projects.title: Unity game: Don't Wake Papa
projects.description: Don't Wake Papa, a Unity-based game for Android and iOS that challenges player reaction time.

projects.title: Three games for Baby TV
projects.description: Development of three games for the Baby TV channel.

projects.title: Roll Out exit – mini game in the Pazam app
projects.description: Roll Out mini game in the Pazam mobile app. Players collect points and win prizes tailored for soldiers.

projects.title: Real-time 3D virtual exhibition for Medium
projects.description: A first-of-its-kind 3D virtual exhibition that runs in every browser and on every device, with high performance and no plugins required.

projects.title: The Labyrinth – strategy game
projects.description: Strategy game for building and exploring mazes in WebGL. Cross platform with fast load times.

projects.title: Don't Wake Papa mobile game
projects.description: A new game that blends timing, quick reactions, focus, and competition. The goal is simple: don't wake dad.

projects.title: Tridshops 3D shopping platform
projects.description: A platform for creating and managing virtual 3D stores where shoppers can browse in real time just like a physical shop.

projects.title: Flash to HTML5 conversion – KKL quiz
projects.description: Converted a KKL application from Flash to HTML5. The move delivered a better user experience and broader compatibility.

projects.title: VIVA DIAMONDS game
projects.description: Game for playfriend777 that combines word challenges with coordination for a unique gameplay style.

projects.title: EduMetrix virtual learning environment
projects.description: A virtual world with dozens of learning objects, some using OneCode's unique 3D technology.

teamMembers.name: Keren Brown Tsamir
teamMembers.bio: With the broad vision of a CEO, the attention to detail of a lawyer, and the multitasking skills of a mother of two, she leads the OneCode OneVision strategy that has guided the company since its founding.

teamMembers.name: Ronen "Ranger" Tsamir
teamMembers.bio: Equipped with wide-angle vision and a long-range lens—and after mapping the terrain and choosing the best tools for each project and business need—he leads projects to safe success.
